data.question: What is the most expensive cake and its flavor?

prediction.sql: SELECT Flavor, Price FROM goods WHERE LOWER(Food) = LOWER('cake') ORDER BY Price DESC LIMIT 1

data.question: What is the cheapest cookie and its flavor?

prediction.sql: SELECT Flavor, Price FROM goods WHERE LOWER(Food) = LOWER('cookie') ORDER BY Price ASC LIMIT 1

data.question: Find the ids of goods that have apple flavor.

prediction.sql: SELECT Id FROM goods WHERE LOWER(Flavor) = LOWER('apple')

data.question: What are the ids of goods that cost less than 3 dollars?

prediction.sql: SELECT Id FROM goods WHERE Price < 3

data.question: List the distinct ids of all customers who bought a lemon cake?

prediction.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 INNER JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Item INNER JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber WHERE LOWER(T1.Food) = LOWER('cake') AND LOWER(T1.Flavor) = LOWER('lemon')

data.question: For each type of food, tell me how many customers have ever bought it.

prediction.sql: SELECT T1.Food, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.CustomerId) FROM goods AS T1 INNER JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Item INNER JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt = T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T1.Food

data.question: Find the id of customers who shopped at the bakery at least 15 times.

prediction.sql: SELECT CustomerId FROM receipts GROUP BY CustomerId HAVING COUNT(ReceiptNumber) >= 15

data.question: What is the last name of the customers who shopped at the bakery more than 10 times?

prediction.sql: SELECT T1.LastName FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.CustomerId GROUP BY T1.LastName HAVING COUNT(T2.ReceiptNumber) > 10

data.question: How many types of Cake does this bakery sell?

prediction.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Flavor) FROM goods WHERE LOWER(Food) = LOWER('Cake')

data.question: List all the flavors of Croissant available in this bakery.

prediction.sql: SELECT Flavor FROM goods WHERE LOWER(Food) = LOWER('Croissant')

data.question: Give me a list of all the distinct items bought by the customer number 15.

prediction.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Item FROM items AS T1 INNER JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.Receipt = T2.ReceiptNumber WHERE T2.CustomerId = 15

data.question: For each type of food, what are the average, maximum and minimum price?

prediction.sql: SELECT Food, AVG(Price) AS average, MAX(Price) AS maximum, MIN(Price) AS minimum FROM goods GROUP BY Food

data.question: Find the receipt numbers where both Cake and Cookie were bought.

prediction.sql: SELECT T1.Receipt FROM items AS T1 INNER JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.Item = T2.Id WHERE LOWER(T2.Food) = LOWER('Cake') INTERSECT SELECT T1.Receipt FROM items AS T1 INNER JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.Item = T2.Id WHERE LOWER(T2.Food) = LOWER('Cookie')

data.question: What is the item that was bought the least number of times?

prediction.sql: SELECT Item FROM Receipt GROUP BY Item ORDER BY COUNT(Ordinal) ASC LIMIT 1

prediction.sql: SELECT Food, COUNT(*) FROM goods GROUP BY Food

data.question: What is the average price for each food type?

prediction.sql: SELECT Food, AVG(Price) FROM goods GROUP BY Food
